title: Snap Inc. Announces First Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text:
Snap Inc. Announces First Quarter 2023 Financial Results

Key Financial Results

Snap Inc. announced financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2023. The results showed mixed performance:

Revenue: $989 million, compared to $1,063 million in the prior year
Net Loss: $329 million, compared to $360 million in the prior year
Adjusted EBITDA: $1 million, compared to $64 million in the prior year
Operating Cash Flow: $151 million, compared to $127 million in the prior year

Market Reception

Snap shares dropped as much as 20% after hours as the company reported first-quarter results that missed analysts' expectations on revenue.

User Growth and Engagement

On a positive note, the community reached 383 million daily active users in Q1, and DAUs increased 15% year-over-year.

Forward Outlook

The company said its internal forecast for second-quarter revenue would be $1.04 billion, representing a 6% year-over-year decline.
